title: Research Compliance Leadership Development
content:
Dr. Edet Isuk, Morgan's Director of Research Compliance and Chief-of-Staff to the Vice President for Research and Economic Development, will be retiring effective January 1, 2026, after 46 years of service to Morgan State University.

Dr. Keyshawn Moncrieffe will serve as Acting Director for Research Compliance until a permanent Director is hired. Dr. Moncrieffe has been collaborating with Dr. Isuk for the past two years in the Research Compliance unit and is well-positioned to continue the unit's work without interruption.

Direct compliance questions during the transition to ask.ora@morgan.edu or 443-885-4044.

key_facts.outgoing_role: Director of Research Compliance and Chief-of-Staff to the VP for Research and Economic Development
